risks: LRS storage provides no zone or geo redundancy — a single-region failure affects all training data and model artifacts
No explicit RBAC role assignments for the managed identity to access Key Vault keys (Key Vault Crypto Officer) or storage data plane (Storage Blob Data Contributor)
No Key Vault key resource defined — CMK encryption references Key Vault but no encryption key is provisioned in the plan
No diagnostic settings resources to route Key Vault, Storage, or ML workspace audit logs to Log Analytics
Public network access is enabled on the ML workspace — may not meet stricter security postures for production
No Azure Container Registry included — ML workspace will auto-create one on first model build or deployment, outside IaC control
correctionsRecommended: Add Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments resources granting the user-assigned managed identity Key Vault Crypto Officer and Storage Blob Data Contributor roles
Add a Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys resource to provision the CMK encryption key within the Key Vault
Consider upgrading both storage accounts from Standard_LRS to Standard_ZRS for zone redundancy in production
Add Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings resources for Key Vault, both storage accounts, and the ML workspace to route audit logs to Log Analytics
Restrict ML workspace publicNetworkAccess to Disabled or tighten managedNetwork isolationMode to AllowOnlyApprovedOutbound for production
Add an explicit Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries resource to keep container registry configuration under IaC control
